fact: TempXZY's live homepage (tempxzy.net) currently advertises four upcoming roadmap features: (1) 'Send and receive files securely with virus scanning,' (2) 'Extend email life to 72 hours with early deletion,' (3) 'Pick your domain or use your own,' and (4) 'Integrate Tempxzy into your apps' (API integration). These are listed as planned/coming-soon items, not yet shipped — the current service auto-deletes emails after 6 hours with no file-send or API capability live today.
TempXZY generates free, encrypted, disposable email addresses that self-destruct after 6 hours. No registration is required.
